allow: Bash(node -e "const content = require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''src/lib/data/articles.ts'', ''utf8''\); const match = content.match\(/export const articles: Article\\[\\] = \\[\(.*?\)\\];/s\); if\(match\) { try { const json = ''['' + match[1] + '']''; JSON.parse\(json\); console.log\(''✓ JSON валиден''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''✗ JSON ошибка:'', e.message.slice\(0, 200\)\); } } else { console.log\(''✗ Не найден массив articles''\); }")
